changesVerified.change: pt-8 top padding on outer wrapper
changesVerified.detail: pt-8 class confirmed present on all 11 instances (indices 0-10) via page_audit wrapper_with_pt8 selector

changesVerified.change: displayAboveContent: absolute left-0 right-0 z-200 on .header-main when true
changesVerified.detail: Instance 10 (overlay variation): .header-main.absolute found=true. Instances 0-9: absolute_header_main=false. Correct.
Instance 10: data-display-above-content=1. Instances 0-9: data-display-above-content=0. All correct.

changesVerified.change: displayAboveContent: -mb-[var(--header-main-height,0px)] on outer wrapper when true
changesVerified.detail: Class present in rendered HTML (confirmed via compare_html). CSS attribute selector [class*='-mb-'] did not match due to Tailwind arbitrary-value class escaping — this is a selector limitation only, not a rendering failure.

changesVerified.change: JS spacer skip when displayAboveContent is true
changesVerified.detail: Verified at line 173: scroll path skips showSpacer() when !displayAboveContent. Line 300: menu-open path also skips showSpacer() when !displayAboveContent. Both paths correct.

changesVerified.change: 10th test variation (Display Above Content / Overlay Mode) added
changesVerified.detail: wp_count_blocks confirmed 10 takt/header-main instances. page_audit returned 11 sections (indices 0-10). Instance 10 is the overlay variation.

build.detail: No errors or warnings in Header block files

warnings.message: class_name() called inside theme_block_props() — theme_block_props() calls class_name() internally; pass the array directly
TSX 0 elements vs PHP 3 elements at depth 1 — pre-existing, expected (InnerBlocks abstraction in editor vs direct DOM in PHP)

registration.detail: block.json valid. All attributes confirmed including new displayAboveContent (type:boolean, default:false)

overlay_data_attribute.detail: data-display-above-content=1 on instance 10 only; 0 on instances 0-9

overlay_absolute_class.detail: .header-main.absolute found on instance 10 only; not present on instances 0-9

no_regressions_normal_instances.detail: All 10 normal instances (0-9) retain correct data attributes and structure; link counts unchanged from prior QA

issues.title: Redundant class_name() inside theme_block_props() at HeaderMain.php:41
issues.description: The outer wrapper uses theme_block_props( class_name([...]) ) but theme_block_props() calls class_name() internally. The array should be passed directly: theme_block_props([...]).
issues.note: Functionally equivalent — no visual or behavioral regression. Minor code quality issue.

notes: Page audit returns 11 sections for 10 block instances — this is expected behavior from the audit tool (0-indexed, 11 items = indices 0-10).
The overlay variation (instance 10) is the last on the test page and correctly demonstrates displayAboveContent=true behavior.
Accessibility preserved: all ARIA attributes, role=menubar, aria-label, aria-expanded, aria-controls, tabindex=-1 on nav confirmed present in rendered HTML.
The pre-existing TSX 0 vs PHP 3 depth-1 sync warning is a known artifact of InnerBlocks abstraction and does not indicate a real mismatch.
Mobile menu flex-wrap behavior from edit cycle 4 confirmed unaffected by this cycle's changes.
